backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Board Saathi backend, defining all data types (student/parent profiles, chapters, notes, questions, mock tests, flashcards, streaks, etc.) and including authorization mixins for access control.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and notable implementation details of every page and component.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) for both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Board Saathi PWA, including manifest link, theme color meta tags, iOS/Safari PWA meta tags, favicon links, and SEO/Open Graph metadata.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Board Saathi specifying app name, display mode, theme/background colors, icon set (32px–512px including maskable), and education/productivity categories.
frontend/public/offline.html: Standalone offline fallback page served by the service worker when the network is unavailable, featuring a styled card with an animated offline badge, retry button, and study tips.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing cache-first for static assets and network-first for navigation requests, with versioned caches, precaching of key URLs, stale cache cleanup on activate, and an offline fallback to offline.html.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up the React app with TanStack Router routes, React Query, theming, and service worker registration. Defines all application routes with auth guards redirecting unauthenticated users to login.
frontend/src/components/AIAssistant.tsx: Floating chat widget that provides an AI assistant named 'Saathi' using local FAQ matching. Renders a toggleable chat panel with message history and basic bold markdown support.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavBar.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile with five primary nav links (Home, Subject, Question, Reminder, Target) that highlight the active route.
frontend/src/components/DailyView.tsx: Displays and manages planner tasks for a specific date, allowing users to add, complete, and delete tasks with a time field via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main authenticated layout with a desktop sidebar, mobile bottom nav, offline banner, and logout functionality. Renders all student-facing nav links and tracks unread message count.
frontend/src/components/NotesSection.tsx: Chapter-level notes component that lets users add text notes with optional image attachments and delete existing notes, backed by React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: Fixed banner that prompts users to install the app as a PWA using the browser's install prompt, with a dismiss option.
frontend/src/components/QuestionsSection: React component that displays, adds, and deletes Q&A pairs for a given chapter, with collapsible answer reveal and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/QuoteOfTheDayCar: Displays a daily motivational quote in a gradient card using a utility function to select the quote.
frontend/src/components/StreakCard.tsx: Shows the user's current and top study streak with a gradient header and earned milestone badges (3, 7, 30 days).
frontend/src/components/TargetMotivation: Displays a circular SVG progress indicator and motivational message based on the percentage of completed targets.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions and status flags backed by DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts: Hook that captures the browser's beforeinstallprompt event and exposes install/dismiss logic with localStorage persistence for a PWA install banner.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central React Query hooks file wrapping all localStorage CRUD operations (subjects, chapters, notes, questions, flashcards, tests, planner, reminders, targets, streaks, etc.) as typed mutations and queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useReminderAlarm.ts: Provides a React hook for playing, previewing, and stopping alarm sounds using the Web Audio API, with a predefined map of available alarm sounds.
React hook that schedules browser notifications (5 minutes before) and alarm sounds (at exact time) for a list of local reminders using setTimeout, with cleanup on unmount.
frontend/src/hooks/useTargetAlarmSchedul: React hook that schedules a 1-hour-before alarm sound and browser notification for incomplete targets with deadlines, clearing timeouts on unmount.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties using an oklch color palette with teal and orange brand colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static informational page that documents all app features (subjects, flashcards, mock tests, planner, targets, reminders, revision, question bank, progress tracker) with descriptions and usage tips.
frontend/src/pages/AttemptMockTestPage.t: Page component for taking a mock test, displaying one question at a time with an elapsed timer, answer selection, progress tracking, and submission that navigates to a report page.
frontend/src/pages/ChaptersPage.tsx: Page that lists chapters for a given subject, allowing users to add chapters, toggle completion status, and expand each chapter to view its notes and questions via tabs.
frontend/src/pages/CreateMockTestPage.ts: Page for creating a new mock test with a form to set test name, subject, and multiple MCQ questions with options and correct answers. Submits via the useCreateMockTest mutation and navigates back to the mock tests list on success.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a days-left-in-month banner, study streak, chapter progress, active targets, upcoming reminders, and unread messages count. Aggregates data from multiple query hooks and provides navigation shortcuts to key app sections.
frontend/src/pages/FlashcardsPage.tsx: Flashcard study page that lists, filters by subject, shuffles, and allows adding/deleting flashcards and marking them as learned. Includes a flip-card UI component and a dialog for creating new flashcards with subject and chapter selection.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Authentication page supporting student login, registration, forgot-password flow, guest access, and separate parent login/registration dialogs. Credentials are validated against localStorage and session state is set before navigating to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/MockTestsPage.tsx: Lists all created mock tests with subject badges, question counts, attempt counts, and best scores. Provides actions to start a test, view its report, delete it, or navigate to the create-test page.
frontend/src/pages/MyAchievementsPage.ts: Displays a user's achievements page including stat cards (chapters completed, questions practiced, streak, fastest test), earned badges, and current rank, fetched via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/ParentDashboard.tsx: Parent dashboard page that lets parents view linked child's study data, send feedback (comment/appreciate/scold), chat with the student, and see alerts—all persisted via localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/PlannerPage.tsx: Monthly calendar planner page that shows task counts per day, allows navigation between months, and opens a DailyView dialog when a day is clicked to manage study tasks.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Profile settings page where authenticated users can update their name, school, and class, change their password, log out, or trigger a PWA service worker update.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressPage.tsx: Progress tracker page displaying overview stats (tasks done, targets met, average score, tests attempted), per-subject chapter completion progress bars, and recent test attempt history.
frontend/src/pages/QuestionBankPage.tsx: Displays a filterable question bank page where users can select a subject and chapter to browse questions, with each question card supporting a toggle to show/hide the answer.
frontend/src/pages/RemindersPage.tsx: Provides a reminders management page allowing users to add reminders with a date, time, and alarm sound (with preview), and delete existing ones, with scheduled notifications via useReminderScheduler.
frontend/src/pages/RevisionPage.tsx: Shows pending and completed spaced-repetition revision tasks sorted by due date, allowing users to mark tasks complete via checkboxes with color-coded due-date status indicators.
frontend/src/pages/StudentMessagesPage.t: Renders a student-facing messaging page that displays parent feedback items (comments, appreciations, scoldings) and a real-time chat interface, all backed by localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/SubjectsPage.tsx: Lists all subjects in a grid with chapter completion progress bars, and provides a dialog to add new subjects, navigating to a subject detail page on card click.
frontend/src/pages/TargetsPage.tsx: Displays a page for managing study targets with add, complete, and delete functionality, including deadline formatting and a 1-hour-before alarm scheduler.
frontend/src/pages/TestReportPage.tsx: Shows a detailed report for a specific mock test attempt, including score summary, progress bar, time taken, and a breakdown of all past attempts.
frontend/src/pages/TimerPage.tsx: Provides a countdown timer page where users can create and delete named timers with start/end dates, displaying live month/day/hour/minute/second countdowns.
frontend/src/utils/faqMatcher.ts: Defines a keyword-based FAQ database covering app features like planner, subjects, notes, mock tests, and reminders for use in a help/chat assistant.
frontend/src/utils/localStorageService.t: Provides a comprehensive offline data service using localStorage/sessionStorage, handling user account management, authentication, session tracking, and namespaced per-user data storage.
frontend/src/utils/quotesData.ts: Contains an array of motivational quotes and a utility function that returns a deterministic quote of the day based on the day of the year.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing a school management app with pending feature requests for a real-time Firebase/ICP-based chat system including presence, typing indicators, timestamps, and push notifications.
